message:
Add graceful degradation for Tower service adapters

Implement graceful degradation when wrapping Tower services that don't
support asupersync features:

- CancellationMode: BestEffort, Strict, TimeoutFallback strategies
- AdapterConfig: Configure cancellation, timeout, budget thresholds
- ErrorAdapter trait: Map between Tower/Asupersync error types
- TowerAdapterError: Adapter-specific error variants
- AsupersyncAdapter: Wrap Tower services with degradation support
- Load shedding: Check Cx budget before waiting on readiness

Closes asupersync-c2l4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
